case_title: TERESITA ALVIZ VS. AUTO WORLD COLLISION, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAG - DALY CITY, LLC DBA CITY TOYOTA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AGAINST DEFENDANT AUTO WORLD, ONLY TO SEP-02-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT.
